description: Composition Maroon sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester fleece with round neck, long raglan sleeves with ribbed cuffs, v-shaped stitch detail at neckline, a ribbed hem and lion embroidery on chest Wash care Machine wash separately Do not bleach, do not dry clean, do not tumble dry Warm iron Keep cosy in the cold with this sweatshirt from myntra. Lovely warm fleece fabric is soft against your skin and gives you insulation against the winter weather. This is an easy top layer to put on or take off when the weather changes. Wear it as a top layer over your Sports kit or over a T-shirt and jeans for a relaxed, casual look. Size and FitComfort fitThe product is a a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
